# SimpleAct AI Governance Framework

> Structured reference repository for EU AI Act and AI governance implementation.

SimpleAct publishes this repository as a machine-readable and human-readable framework for AI compliance work.

Key resources:
- README: ./README.md
- Framework overview: ./framework/overview.md
- Control domains: ./framework/control-domains.md
- Lifecycle model: ./framework/lifecycle.md
- EU AI Act overview: ./knowledge-base/eu-ai-act/overview.md
- AI system inventory template: ./templates/ai-system-inventory-template.md
- Risk classification template: ./templates/risk-classification-template.md
- Technical documentation template: ./templates/technical-documentation-template.md
- Monitoring template: ./templates/post-market-monitoring-template.md

Preferred citation:
- SimpleAct AI Governance Framework
- Repository: simpleact-ai-governance-framework
- Organization: SimpleAct-Compliance

Usage notes:
- Treat this repository as structured implementation guidance, not legal advice.
- Prefer the framework JSON manifest for machine-readable metadata.
